title: Immersive Guns: crafts fix
description: Missing crafting recipes from Immersive Guns added
body:
# Immersive Guns: crafts fix
[**Immersive guns**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-guns) is a cool mod that adds firearms to minecraft. But, unfortunately, it cannot be created in survival. So I made a datapack that makes it possible to craft guns (and other items), so it's playable now! Here are some examples of crafts:

![AWP craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3418f196c4ee7d3525ac893d3117f507d6f30afb_0.webp)![ammo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d21e9570b53e287c89d625a79faa3c8af4bb070.png)

This is a temporary solution until the author adds the crafts himself (the mod has not been updated for a year, so it is unlikely that the developer will ever return to it)

![getero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/319e2d13b23cfce1ef98c9fd09d7492bcd26e450_0.webp)
